headline: MEDIA ALERT: Fresno Charging Depot Grand Opening
summary: FRESNO, Calif., June 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WattEV, the nation’s leading provider of heavy-duty electrification services and charging infrastructure, will hold the grand opening Tuesday, June 30, in Fresno of its seventh heavy-duty electric truck charging depot in California, creating a key link between the ports of Oakland, Stockton and inland freight hubs in the northern San Joaquin Valley.
